---
title: "Noah Richter"
name: "Noah Richter"
image: "/images/profile_pics/noah_richter.jpg"
research: "**Research subject:** Sensitivity of tropical understory birds to tourist activity"
location: "**Research location:** Panama"
dates: "**Dates:** 2020-2021"
category: "Alumni"
category_order: "6"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
